summary: Completed Phase 1 Admin Panel Enhancement testing for Social World Panel SMM SaaS. All backend APIs pass (23/23), frontend admin pages load correctly with charts, providers, bonuses, and reports functionality working as expected.

issues: Recharts showing console warnings about negative width/height during initial render - charts render correctly but console has warnings about container sizing

passed_tests: Admin login with admin@kalia.com / Hanumanji22@ - SUCCESS
Admin dashboard loads with all 6 charts (Revenue 30d line, Orders 30d bar, Users line, Orders by Status donut, Revenue by Payment Method donut, Top 5 Services horizontal bar) - SUCCESS
Admin Providers page: Mock SMM Provider displayed with status='active', balance shown - SUCCESS
Admin Providers page: Test Connection button works, returns balance and ping - SUCCESS
Admin Providers page: Refresh Balance button works, updates balance in UI - SUCCESS
Admin Bonuses page: Settings tab with Enable Bonus System and First Deposit Bonus toggles - SUCCESS
Admin Bonuses page: Deposit Tiers tab shows all 5 tiers ($10-49=3%, $50-99=5%, $100-199=8%, $200-499=10%, $500+=15%) - SUCCESS
Admin Bonuses page: Promotions tab displays existing promotions, Add Promotion modal works - SUCCESS
Admin Reports page: Revenue report with date range filter - SUCCESS
Admin Reports page: Export CSV button present and functional - SUCCESS
Admin Reports page: Profit, Orders, Payments tabs all functional - SUCCESS
User registration flow works - redirects to dashboard after signup - SUCCESS
Backend API tests: 23/23 passed including all admin endpoints
action_items: LOW: Fix Recharts container sizing warnings in Admin Dashboard (set explicit minWidth/minHeight on chart containers)
seed_data_creation: Test promotions created via API during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 Admin Panel Enhancement complete. All new admin pages (Dashboard with Recharts, Providers management, Bonuses/Tiers/Promotions, Reports with CSV export) are fully functional. Backend is modularized into routes/. Mock SMM Provider is seeded and works with test connection and refresh balance. MOCKED: SMM Provider API (MockSMMProvider class), Payment gateways (auto-complete).
